title: FPS Miner
description: FPS Miner - Boost Your Minecraft Performance!
body:
![Subscribe](https://iili.io/2iWiiQa.png)
[**Subscribe**](https://www.youtube.com/@pooriaminer)

# FPS Miner - Boost Your Minecraft Performance!

**Are you tired of lag spikes ruining your Minecraft experience? FPS Miner is the ultimate modpack tailored to deliver smooth gameplay, especially for players who want to maximize their FPS on low to mid-range systems.**

## Features:
**1. Optimized Performance:** Includes essential mods like Sodium, Lithium, and Iris for better frame rates and reduced input lag.

**2. Custom Graphics Tweaks:** Fine-tune your settings with Reese’s Sodium Options and Zoomify for the best visuals without sacrificing performance.

**3. Faster Loading Times:** Say goodbye to long startup times with mods like FastQuit and ImmediatelyFast.

**4. Lightweight & Focused:** This pack only includes performance-boosting mods, ensuring compatibility with most servers and custom mod setups.

## Included Mods:
This pack utilizes trusted mods such as:
**1.** Sodium, Lithium, and Phosphor for FPS optimization.

**2.** Iris for shaders support.

**3.** EntityCulling to reduce unnecessary entity rendering.

**4.** Krypton for network performance enhancements.
(For a full list of mods, check the README file or the modpack details section on CurseForge.)

## Compatibility:
**1.** Designed for Minecraft 1.21 with Fabric Loader.

**2.** Works seamlessly with most modpacks or vanilla Minecraft servers.

## How to Install:
**1.** Download the pack and import.

**2.** Launch Minecraft with the Fabric Loader (version 1.21).

**3.** Enjoy the performance boost!

Feel free to suggest improvements or report issues on the modpack page. Happy mining!

Made by [PooriaMiner](https://www.youtube.com/@pooriaminer) <- Click to view youtube channel
